## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have removed any console.log statements and debugging code

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have added/updated JSDoc comments for new functions

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested on multiple browsers (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested on mobile devices (if applicable)

### Dependencies
- [ ] I have checked that no new dependencies were added unnecessarily
- [ ] All new dependencies are properly documented
- [ ] I have run `npm audit` and addressed any security issues

### Accessibility
- [ ] I have tested keyboard navigation
- [ ] I have tested with a screen reader (if applicable)
- [ ] I have ensured proper color contrast
- [ ] I have added proper ARIA labels where needed

### Performance
- [ ] I have optimized images (if applicable)
- [ ] I have checked for performance regressions
- [ ] I have tested loading times

### Internationalization
- [ ] I have added translations for all new text (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested RTL layout (if applicable)
- [ ] All languages are properly supported
